description:
🕒 18:30–20:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-cyokotto-lighttrap/

A specialist guide will lead you through the forest at night—a place most people rarely visit after dark—to search for nocturnal wildlife. This tour will also use a light trap to introduce summer insects attracted to light. Experience the wonder and excitement of the night forest while learning about the fascination and importance of nature and its creatures.

【Fee】¥2,500 per person, ¥2,000 for repeat visitors, ¥5,000 per family (includes insurance and guide)

【Capacity】20 people

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Wildlife Section, Hanno Ecotourism Citizen Guides Association)

【What to bring】Flashlight (headlamp recommended), drinking water, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that keeps both hands free is best), towel, insect repellent spray, long sleeves and long pants, well-fitting non-slip athletic shoes, hat
location: 集合 飯能市中央公園トイレ前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」下車徒歩1分）
summary: Easy Night Nature Tour: Nocturnal Wildlife Search & Light Trap
